selector_role.rule_snippet: .mainpop .conbox ul li .btn {display: inline-block; padding: 0 14px 0 46px; height: 30px; font-size: 15px; color: #fff; line-height: 30px; letter-spacing: -0.02em; vertical-align:middle;}
.mainpop .conbox ul li .btn.go {background: #dd3c70 url('../images/main/popimg/mainpop_gobtn_bg2.jpg') no-repeat left center; font-size: 14px; height: 26px; line-height: 26px; margin-left: 15px;}
.mainpop .conbox ul li .btn.down {background: #ebb3a4 url('../images/main/popimg/mainpop_downbtn_bg1.jpg') no-repeat left center; font-size: 14px; height: 26px; line-height: 26px;}
.mainpop .conbox ul li .btn {padding: 0 14px 0 3rem; height: 1.7rem; font-size: 0.9rem; color: #fff; line-height: 1.7rem;}
